summary: SentCom Chat Enhancement P0 Features - All Features Verified. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (chat with history, bot start/stop, mode changes, risk params). Frontend: Settings panel with Trading Mode (Autonomous/Confirmation/Paused) and Risk Controls (Risk/Trade, Max Daily Loss, Max Positions, Min R:R) fully functional.

details: sentcom_service.py chat() method passes chat_history to orchestrator
/api/sentcom/chat endpoint accepts messages and returns responses in 'we' voice
SentCom panel renders with bot status (ACTIVE/STOPPED)
Mode selector badge shows current mode (CONFIRMATION highlighted)
Trading Mode tab shows Autonomous/Confirmation/Paused buttons
Risk Controls tab shows Risk/Trade, Max Daily Loss, Max Positions, Min R:R inputs

critical_code_review_comments: sentcom_service.py: chat() method correctly builds recent_history from _chat_history and passes to orchestrator.process()
orchestrator.py: process() method correctly accepts chat_history parameter and passes to session context
coach_agent.py: _build_coaching_prompt_async() includes conversation_history for multi-turn context
trading_bot.py: All bot control endpoints (/start, /stop, /mode/{mode}, /risk-params) properly implemented
SentCom.jsx: useTradingBotControl hook correctly calls updateRiskParams() which POSTs to /api/trading-bot/risk-params
SentCom.jsx: RiskControlsPanel component properly renders all 4 risk parameter inputs with data-testid attributes

mocked_apis.note: LLM responses may return fallback messages when Ollama Pro not available (expected). All other APIs are real implementations.

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features fully tested: 1) Chat conversational context - backend passes chat_history to orchestrator which includes it in prompts, 2) Bot control - start/stop, mode changes, risk params all working via APIs and UI. SentCom Settings panel has two tabs: 'Trading Mode' (3 modes) and 'Risk Controls' (4 params). IB Gateway shows OFFLINE in preview (expected).
